title: Payroll Input
description: Represents a payroll input entry in the Workday Payroll system, used for additional pay components, deductions, or adjustments to be processed in a payroll run.

id.description: The unique Workday identifier for the payroll input

descriptor.description: The display name of the payroll input

worker.description: The worker this payroll input applies to

payComponent.description: The pay component (earnings, deduction, or contribution type)

amount.description: The monetary amount for the payroll input

startDate.description: The start date for the payroll input

endDate.description: The end date for the payroll input

position.description: The position associated with the payroll input
